AboutPage.title: ABOUT US
AboutPage.heading: OVERVIEW OF MANDALA HANDMADE COSMETICS
AboutPage.paragraphs: Mandala handmade cosmetics are a delicate blend of gentle natural ingredients and meticulous handcrafted processes, resulting in safe, mild, and environmentally friendly skincare products. Inspired by balance and harmony, Mandala focuses not only on effective skincare but also on a relaxing experience, nurturing beauty from within. Each product is created with passion, helping skin become healthy, radiant, and naturally beautiful in a sustainable way.
